docs.title: Stripe Integration Guide
docs.content:
Stripe Integration Guide

This guide documents the billing-service Stripe integration.

## Webhook handler
All Stripe events arrive at POST /webhooks/stripe. The handler is `StripeWebhookHandler` in services/billing/stripe_webhook.py. It validates the Stripe-Signature header using the STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var before processing.

## Idempotency
Use the Stripe event ID as an idempotency key. Duplicate events are common during retries.

## Supported events
- invoice.paid → mark subscription active
- invoice.payment_failed → trigger dunning flow
- customer.subscription.deleted → suspend account

docs.title: services/billing/stripe_webhook.py
docs.content:
# services/billing/stripe_webhook.py

class StripeWebhookHandler:
    """Handles inbound Stripe webhook events."""

    async def handle(self, request: Request) -> Response:
        sig = request.headers.get('Stripe-Signature')
        # validate sig ...
        event = stripe.Event.construct_from(await request.json())
        await self._dispatch(event)

    async def _dispatch(self, event: stripe.Event) -> None:
        ...

expected_edges.note: Notion guide explicitly names and documents the StripeWebhookHandler class in stripe_webhook.py
